title: pyrus crastina
intro: Pyrus crastina, also known as the May dew or Chinese hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus crastina include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. It can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
